name: UI State Machine Decomposed
description: Complex UI state machines (5+ states) should be decomposed into regions to generate exhaustive edge case tests.
rationale: Manual testing of state machines is error-prone because the number of paths grows exponentially. Region decomposition by ImandraX finds every distinct execution path and generates a test for each.

examples.passes: Formalize(checkoutMachine, 8 states) → Decompose(47 regions) → GenerateTests(47 tests)
examples.fails: Complex state machine with 12 states but no decomposition performed
